---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for capture, validation, export, or agent integration
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What current limitation motivates this request?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you would like the feature to work. If you have a specific CLI command, API endpoint, or file format in mind, include it.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered and why they fall short.

## Use case

Who benefits from this feature and in what scenario? (e.g. "A researcher archiving a thread for citation", "An agent consuming the archive for summarization")

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.

## Checklist

- [ ] This feature does not involve bulk-scraping or bypassing platform access controls.
- [ ] I have checked existing issues for duplicates.
